# Results

This section will be populated from Mini-Lab runs. Results will be reported in three stages: (1) baseline existence and accounting validation, (2) SOTA PSKVE operation and fixed-objective comparisons, and (3) TISE value-creation and disruption-resilience comparisons. The figures and tables below define the target result artifacts; until simulation data are available, they should not be interpreted as empirical findings.

![Figure 10. Comparison of baseline, SOTA platform, and TISE configurations.](/figures/generated/f_10.png){#fig-modelcomparison}

![Figure 11. Independent versus PUDAL-synchronized Mission Intensity Graphs.](/figures/generated/f_11.png){#fig-sync}

![Figure 12. Waste Reduction Score and raw waste comparison.](/figures/generated/f_12.png){#fig-waste}

![Figure 13. Vendor financial and operational sustainability.](/figures/generated/f_13.png){#fig-vendor}

![Figure 14. Student satisfaction dimensions.](/figures/generated/f_14.png){#fig-student}

![Figure 15. Mission achievement dashboard.](/figures/generated/f_15.png){#fig-mission}

![Figure 16. Ecosystem Value Index decomposition.](/figures/generated/f_16.png){#fig-evi}

![Figure 17. Robustness of candidate MSRS policies.](/figures/generated/f_17.png){#fig-robustness}

![Figure 18. Scenario performance heatmap.](/figures/generated/f_18.png){#fig-heatmap}

{{< include /tables/table18_performance.qmd >}}

{{< include /tables/table19_scenario_performance.qmd >}}

{{< include /tables/table20_msrs_ranking.qmd >}}
